form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length second (30.27) over 525m at The Meadows and making it two placings on end. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length second (30.27) over 525m at The Meadows and making it two placings on end. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (30.32) over 525m at The Meadows. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (30.32) over 525m at The Meadows. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Finished second (30.11) at The Meadows last time making it four placings in a row. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second (30.11) at The Meadows last time making it four placings in a row. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.03. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at Sandown at Grade 4/5 eight days ago. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.03. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at Sandown at Grade 4/5 eight days ago. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Wentworth Park (29.74) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 2 length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Wentworth Park (29.74) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 2 length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5 lengths in 25.70, beating Mepunga Brockie. Last start finished 7th over 515m at Sandown beaten 7 lengths (30.00) behind Typhoon Baylee in a Grade 4/5 on April 2. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5 lengths in 25.70, beating Mepunga Brockie. Last start finished 7th over 515m at Sandown beaten 7 lengths (30.00) behind Typhoon Baylee in a Grade 4/5 on April 2. Tempted to look elsewhere.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching home turn and then lost ground in home straight.
Quick to begin; Visibly eased approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.86) when seventh over 515m at Sandown in a Special conditions G3. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (29.86) when seventh over 515m at Sandown in a Special conditions G3. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 515m at Sandown in a handy (29.49), beating Capricorn One. Can bring up a hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 515m at Sandown in a handy (29.49), beating Capricorn One. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 5.5 lengths over 400m at this track (22.38). In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 5.5 lengths over 400m at this track (22.38). In form and is right in the mix again.
